description.zh: 插件作者向导(技能)· 输入 /author-plugin 触发,手把手带非工程师在约 10 分钟内做出第一个可被 server 加载的插件:有效的 forgeax-plugin.json + 一个最小 hello tool + reload 验证。
description.en: Plugin Author Guide skill — type /author-plugin and it walks a non-engineer through building their first server-loadable plugin in ~10 minutes: a valid forgeax-plugin.json + a minimal hello tool + a reload-and-verify step.

description.zh: 10 分钟从零做出 hello-plugin。包含 manifest 模板 + tool entry.backend 模板 + 验证步骤。
description.en: Bootstrap a hello-plugin in 10 minutes — manifest template, entry.backend skeleton, and verification steps included.
